name: Camden, New Jersey

rent.notes: New Jersey has no residential rental tax. Water, sewage, and trash are separate utility bills (not included in rent).
rent.gigInternetNotes: 75% fiber availability. Comcast Xfinity is primary provider in Camden proper.

groceries.notes: 2 adults; no sales tax on groceries in NJ

electricity.notes: PSE&G. Moderate A/C needs; electric heat supplement.

gas.notes: PSE&G. Natural gas primary heat (cold NJ winters), cooking, water heater.

sewage.notes: Camden County MUA. Billed separately or with water.

trash.notes: Municipal collection. Some areas included in property tax.

utilities.taxes: New Jersey exempts residential utilities from sales tax.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig).

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B ($174.70/mo) + Medigap Plan G (~$150/mo x2 people) + Part D (~$45/mo x2). Cooper University Hospital is a Level 1 trauma center.

transportation.notes: PATCO light rail to Philadelphia available; car optional but recommended

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, streaming services, occasional dining out

clothing.notes: No sales tax on clothing in NJ

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ or similar budget carriers. 2 phones with basic data.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Routine medical out-of-pocket, specialist visits, labs

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Camden County, NJ). Southern NJ — Ambetter, AmeriHealth, Oscar, Horizon. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

petDaycare.notes: South NJ pricing — below NOVA averages.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: SS exempt. Retirement income exclusion up to $100K for couples (income <$150K).

acaMarketplace.notes: Southern NJ — Ambetter, AmeriHealth, Oscar, Horizon.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

pros: Significantly lower cost of living than surrounding NJ suburbs
PATCO light rail to Philadelphia available
NJ exempts SS from state tax
No sales tax on groceries or clothing
Cooper University Hospital — major Level 1 trauma center
Access to Philly cultural institutions and healthcare
cons: Higher crime rates than average (though improving)
Less car-dependent than suburbs but PATCO focused on commuters
Limited gig internet coverage (75% vs 95%+ in suburbs)
